name: Taco Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven and cookie sheet to 400°F.
2. Prick bottom and sides of pie crust.
3. Place pie crust on cookie sheet; bake 10 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool.
4. Reduce heat to 350°F.
5. In skillet, cook onion and beef until browned; drain fat.
6. Add taco seasoning mix and prepare according to package directions.
7. In small bowl, combine refried beans and 1/3 cup taco sauce. Mix well.
8. Layer half bean mixture into pie crust.
9. Top with half of seasoned meat, 1 cup cheese, and crushed tortilla chips.
10. Repeat layers, excluding chips.
11. Bake on cookie sheet for 20-25 minutes.
12. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
13. Top with lettuce, tomato, sour cream, and olives; serve with additional taco sauce if desired.
